mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ct_image WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY status

SELECT u.username, COUNT(i.id) AS uploadCount, SUM(CAST(i.file_size AS UNSIGNED)) AS totalSize FROM ct_image i LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON i.user_id = u.id WHERE i.deleted = 0 GROUP BY i.user_id, u.username ORDER BY uploadCount DESC
